title: Plan and schedule compost production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and schedule compost production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish production requirements

pcs.text: Verify specifications for compost production output with stakeholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify specifications for compost production output with stakeholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify specifications for compost production output with stakeholder.

pcs.text: Quantify production requirements according to production output
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify production requirements according to production output?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify production requirements according to production output.

pcs.text: Determine conditions affecting production requirements stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine conditions affecting production requirements stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine conditions affecting production requirements stakeholders.

pcs.text: Estimate production capacity for site and equipment capability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate production capacity for site and equipment capability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate production capacity for site and equipment capability.

pcs.text: Prepare a production schedule according to estimates and conditions for production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a production schedule according to estimates and conditions for production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a production schedule according to estimates and conditions for production.

pcs.text: Develop contingencies for raw material or product supply errors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop contingencies for raw material or product supply errors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop contingencies for raw material or product supply errors.

pcs.text: Document and submit production plan for stakeholder approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and submit production plan for stakeholder approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and submit production plan for stakeholder approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish production requirements

elements.title: Verify operational compliance and resource availability

pcs.text: Identify environmental and workplace health and safety impact of production process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and workplace health and safety impact of production process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and workplace health and safety impact of production process.

pcs.text: Verify compliance with environmental and health and safety procedures and licences
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify compliance with environmental and health and safety procedures and licences?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify compliance with environmental and health and safety procedures and licences.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of work team, machinery and equipment for compost production.

elements.title: Schedule production to meet requirement

pcs.text: Calculate batch types and volumes of compost-based products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate batch types and volumes of compost-based products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate batch types and volumes of compost-based products.

pcs.text: Obtain laboratory and field test data of compost materials pre- and post-production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain laboratory and field test data of compost materials pre- and post-production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain laboratory and field test data of compost materials pre- and post-production.

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust production schedule according to field and laboratory test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust production schedule according to field and laboratory test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust production schedule according to field and laboratory test results.

pcs.text: Release product to customer according to production plan, schedule and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release product to customer according to production plan, schedule and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release product to customer according to production plan, schedule and workplace procedures.
